heading: Enlisted members: discharge or retirement for years of service or for age
label: 12108 Enlisted members: discharge or retirement for years of service or for age
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first month that begins more than 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2001 Amendment note under .Dec. 28, 2001section 517(g) of Pub. L. 107–107section 10154 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first month that begins more than 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2001 Amendment note under .Dec. 28, 2001section 517(g) of Pub. L. 107–107section 10154 of this title

children.text: be transferred to the Retired Reserve if the member is qualified for such transfer and does not request (in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned) not to be transferred to the Retired Reserve; or
be discharged if the member is not qualified for transfer to the Retired Reserve or has requested (in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned) not to be so transferred.
